passages.title: Preserving Vietnam's Cultural Heritage
passages.passageText: Vietnam has a rich cultural heritage, and preserving it is crucial for future generations. To conserve this heritage, the government and people must collaborate. (1) Many of Vietnam's traditional customs, monuments, and folk art forms are (2) at risk due to modernization and urbanization. Through education and awareness programs, citizens can learn to appreciate and protect (3) their cultural heritage. Monuments and artifacts, inspired by ancient designs, must be maintained and restored by experts. (4) Following the rules of preservation, we can ensure that Vietnam's cultural treasures will survive. It is important (5) to understand the significance of these (6) traditions so they are not forgotten.

passages.title: Education Paths
passages.passageText: Graduation is approaching. Are you torn between university or vocational education? Explore your options: Academic Track focuses on high-level qualifications. Vocational Track focuses on practical skills. Consider an internship to earn while learning. Choosing a career path may seem difficult at first. The right choice will pave the way for future success. Having achieved excellent results, you deserve the best guidance.

questions.question: Question 7: What type of education provides hands-on experience?

Question 9: What should students consider in vocational track?
Question 10: Choosing a path may seem ___ at first.
Question 11: The right choice ___ will pave the way.
Question 12: ___ excellent results, you deserve best guidance.

passages.title: Cultural Heritage Reading
passages.passageText: Cultural heritage plays a crucial role in preserving identity and values. It includes historical sites and customs passed through generations. Heritage helps people understand their roots and develop pride. Many countries protect heritage because it reflects their unique history. Preserving ancient sites promotes tourism and economic benefits. Raising awareness ensures long-term conservation for future generations.

questions.question: Question 18: Heritage includes historical ___ and customs.
Question 19: Heritage ___ people understand their roots.
Question 20: Many countries ___ great efforts to protect.
Question 21: ___ ancient sites, governments promote tourism.
Question 22: Awareness ensures long-term ___ of heritage.

passages.title: Independence
passages.passageText: Being independent is important for students. It helps manage time, solve problems, and take responsibility. Good time management keeps students on track. Setting goals and breaking big tasks into smaller ones helps. Making decisions builds confidence. Small choices like organizing materials lead to bigger decisions. Seeking help shows independence means not doing everything alone. Growth mindset means effort leads to improvement. Embracing challenges makes students resilient.

questions.question: Question 23: What is the main idea about independence?
options: A. Focus only on academic success.
B. Become more confident in social situations.
C. Independence is essential and achieved through practical ways.
D. Time management is most important.

questions.question: Question 24: What is NOT mentioned as a way?
Question 25: Procrastination means ___
Question 26: They refers to ___
Question 27: Independent is opposite of ___
Question 28: What helps develop independence?
options: A. Avoid challenges to prevent mistakes.
C. Break large tasks into smaller ones.

questions.question: Question 29: Which is TRUE?
options: A. Rely solely on others for help.
B. Growth mindset helps handle challenges.

questions.question: Question 30: What can be inferred?
options: A. Never need help from others.
C. Know when to seek help effectively.
